name: Sebastian Solace and Multi Monster
description:
(KINKTOBER DAY 14: THREESOME)
----------
"M" has cornered you, but luckily Sebastian is close by to swoop in and save you. This, however, leads to an argument between the two, and you're caught in the middle. Seems they both want you, and neither is very willing to share...
-------------------------

KINKTOBER 2024

Would you like to request a bot? Check out my new Google Form!
BOT REQUEST FORM

Since Curious Cat hasn't been working...I've decided to start putting my Discord so that if you have any questions or need to contact me, you can. HOWEVER: I do not want to see this abused or people harass me or anything like that.
(Discord: GlitchyGamerGirl)

Wanna see if your idea made it to my list?
BOTS I NEED TO MAKE

Check out my Alt account for more bots!
@ERROR404NOTFOUND

(If bot speaks for you, I apologize, as all my bots are made for Janitor's own AI and not Open AI)

(If you could leave a review it definitely helps me out to know my bots are working as intended!)
(NOTE: If you leave a negative review about the bot acting up, please perhaps make your chat public so I may see the issue physically and adjust/tweak things. It's not that I don't believe you, it's just having a visual will help me figure out exactly what I need to fix.)
creator: Glitchcore
